Meet Dr. Sarah Stewart

Long before she was a podiatrist, Dr. Sarah Stewart was the one stretching at the barre. Years of competitive ballet, tap, jazz, and lyrical dance has taught her how much your feet really do for you—and how much it hurts when they stop cooperating.

Dancing also taught her about doctors. She saw what it felt like to be rushed through an appointment, told to wait for the pain to go away and reduce activities for weeks without an end point, or pushed toward a treatment that didn't fix what was actually wrong.

When she opened Grandville Foot and Ankle, she set out to do it differently. It's the kind of care you'd hope to find at a big-city specialty clinic and rarely do. Conversations in plain language instead of medical jargon. Honest answers about which options make sense for your goals—and which probably don't. And a foot doctor who remembers the details about your life from one visit to the next.

Ready to be heard? Request your appointment today.

How It Works

1

Book Your Visit

Request an appointment online or call our Grandville office—same-day slots are often available for urgent issues.

2

Get a Real Plan

Sit down with Dr. Stewart for a thorough evaluation and a clear, honest treatment roadmap that fits your timeline and budget.

3

Get Back to Living

Return to the people and activities you love with healthier, pain-free feet.

Book Your Appointment Today

What Our Patients Are Saying

Grandville Foot & Ankle

Foot Care Designed Around Your Real Life

You lace up for your morning run, and that sharp pain in your heel shows up again. Your daughter sits out of dance class because an ingrown toenail won't quit. Or maybe you've been told for years that your bunion is just something you'll have to live with—unless you want to spend months in a surgical boot or not walking.

At Grandville Foot and Ankle, none of that has to be your reality.

Dr. Sarah Stewart built her podiatry practice for people who want more than a rushed appointment and a one-size-fits-all answer. Parents drive from 40 minutes out because no one near them treats kids' feet. Runners chasing one more good season come here for second opinions when other doctors tell them surgery or quitting their sport is their only option. Patients who were told their bunions couldn't be fixed walk out of surgery on the same day and back into their lives.

You'll find tools and treatments at Grandville Foot and Ankle that most podiatry offices in West Michigan simply don't offer. Minimally invasive bunion correction without hardware and same day walking. Class IV laser therapy and extracorporeal shockwave therapy for stubborn heel pain. Regenerative medicine and liposana. SWIFT microwave therapy and four other treatment options for warts for both kids and adults. Custom functional orthotics for dress shoes, running shoes, and everyday shoes. Painless ingrown toenail correction with Onyfix. Cosmetic laser and KeryFlex treatments for fungal nail changes. Same-day appointments for urgent needs. In-office X-ray and ultrasound, with results at your appointments.

What truly sets this practice apart isn't only the technology, however. It's the feeling of walking into an office where someone actually listens, asks the right questions, and treats you like the person you are—not a chart number.

Need urgent foot care?

Visit Our Grandville Foot Care Clinic

When foot pain is keeping you from your job, your sport, your family, or your everyday routine, the right podiatrist makes all the difference. Grandville Foot and Ankle serves patients throughout West Michigan—including Wyoming, Walker, Hudsonville, Jenison, Byron Center, Caledonia, Grand Rapids, East Grand Rapids, Ada, Holland, and Grand Haven. Call us or fill out the form below to request your appointment.
